## How I tested

- [ ] `cargo check` clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean (or noted exceptions)
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Ran the affected slash command / CLI flag manually

## Risk + rollout

<!-- Anything that would surprise a reviewer: schema change, breaking flag, dependency added, increased binary size, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the next version's section
- [ ] Updated docs / README if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or PII in the diff
